cases.title: Fallback Routes
cases.description: Keep fallback routes explicit so reviewers can see when a repair path was chosen.

cases.title: Replay Ledger
cases.description: Replay Ledger explains how a replay file captures commands, exit codes, and the smallest proof needed to re-run the repair.

cases.title: Boundary Markers
cases.description: Separate rejected private material from publishable repair evidence.

cases.title: No-op Case
cases.description: Leave already-valid files unchanged so reviewers can trust the candidate did not rewrite healthy metadata.
